The '''''Columbia''''' was a [[MC80a Star Cruiser]] that participated in the [[Rescue from the Dargon|rescue operation]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prison ship ''[[Dargon]]''. It sent [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|Assault transports]] to rescue the prisoners on board the ''Dargon'' before the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Callisto]]'' could arrive to reinforce the Imperial defenders.

==Behind the scenes==
Although the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] featured in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' are identified in-game as [[MC80a Star Cruiser]]s,<ref name="XvT" /> that term was later [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] by the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> to refer to a different model of [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] depicted in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="endnotes12">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/25364458982/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-12|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 12}}</ref>
